defence_leadership_governance.name: Ministry Leadership & Governance
defence_leadership_governance.description: Leadership of the defense sector. Includes the Minister of Defence, Chief of Defence Staff (CDS), and Defence Headquarters (DHQ) strategic communications.

defence_operations_command.name: Defence Operations Command Structure
defence_operations_command.description: Operational command and control. Covers different theatre commands, Operation Hadin Kai, Operation Whirl Stroke, and military restructuring.

counter_insurgency_northeast.name: Counter-Insurgency – Northeast
counter_insurgency_northeast.description: War against terrorism in the Northest (Borno, Yobe, Adamawa). Covers Boko Haram, ISWAP (Islamic State West Africa Province), Sambisa Forest operations, and terrorist surrender.

counter_insurgency_northwest.name: Counter-Insurgency – Northwest
counter_insurgency_northwest.description: Security operations in Northwest (Zamfara, Kaduna, Katsina, Sokoto). Covers banditry, kidnapping, cattle rustling, and military raids on bandit camps.

counter_insurgency_middle_belt.name: Counter-Insurgency – Middle Belt
counter_insurgency_middle_belt.description: Conflict in North Central (Plateau, Benue, Niger). Covers farmer-herder crisis, communal clashes, and military peacekeeping.

multinational_regional_ops.name: Multinational & Regional Operations
multinational_regional_ops.description: Cross-border military cooperation. Includes MNJTF (Multinational Joint Task Force) operating in Lake Chad Basin.

nigerian_army_operations.name: Nigerian Army Operations & Divisions
nigerian_army_operations.description: Activities specific to the Nigerian Army. Includes Chief of Army Staff (COAS), infantry operations, and recruitment.

nigerian_navy_maritime.name: Nigerian Navy & Maritime Operations
nigerian_navy_maritime.description: Naval operations in the Niger Delta and Gulf of Guinea. Covers oil theft, illegal refining, privacy, pipeline protection, and Chief of Naval Staff (CNS).

nigerian_air_force.name: Nigerian Air Force Operations
nigerian_air_force.description: Air operations and aerial bombardment. Covers Chief of Air Staff (CAS), Super Tucano jets, airstrikes on terrorist camps, and UAV deployment.

military_equipment_procurement.name: Military Equipment & Defence Procurement
military_equipment_procurement.description: Acquisition of arms and logistics. Includes purchase of fighter jets, armored personnel carriers (APCs), DICON (Defence Industries Corporation of Nigeria), and budget allocation for weapons.
